p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: T1, x2: T0) { relation_converse[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2, x1) }[A, B](r, y, x)

function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T1) -> Bool) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T1) { not x0(x2, x3) or x1(x2, x3) } = relation_subset[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[A, B](r, s)

let w0: A satisfy { exists(k0: B) { r(w0, k0) and not s(w0, k0) } }
let w1: B satisfy { r(w0, w1) and not s(w0, w1) }
not s(w0, w1)
let w2: B satisfy { r(w0, w2) and not s(w0, w2) }
not s(w0, w2)
function(x0: A, x1: B) { not r(x0, x1) or s(x0, x1) }(w0, w2)

goal: relation_pullback[A, B](f, r, x, y) = r(f(x), f(y))

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x2: T0, x3: T0) { relation_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) = x1(x0(x2), x0(x3)) }[A, B](f, r, x, y)

goal: relation_pullback[A, B](f, s, x, y) = s(f(x), f(y))

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x2: T0, x3: T0) { relation_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) = x1(x0(x2), x0(x3)) }[A, B](f, s, x, y)

goal: relation_subset[A, A](relation_pullback[A, B](f, r), relation_pullback[A, B](f, s))

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T1, T1) -> Bool, x2: (T1, T1) -> Bool) { not relation_subset[T0, T0](relation_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x1), relation_pullback[T0, T1](x0, x2)) or not is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or relation_subset[T1, T1](x1, x2) }[A, B](f, r, s)

goal: relation_subset[B, B](relation_pushforward[A, B](f, r), relation_pushforward[A, B](f, s))

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x2: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not relation_subset[T1, T1](relation_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x1), relation_pushforward[T0, T1](x0, x2)) or not is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or relation_subset[T0, T0](x1, x2) }[A, B](f, r, s)

goal: is_predecessor_closed_predicate[T](r, p) = forall(x0: T) { forall(x1: T) { r(x1, x0) implies p(x1) } implies p(x0) }

p.c: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x2: T0) { exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0, x2) and not x1(k0) } or x1(x2) } = is_predecessor_closed_predicate[T0](x0, x1) }[T](r, p)
not is_predecessor_closed_predicate[T](r, p) or forall(x0: T) { exists(k0: T) { r(k0, x0) and not p(k0) } or p(x0) } = true

goal: is_well_founded_recursive_solution[T, U](r, step, f) = forall(x0: T) { f(x0) = step(x0, f) }

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: (T0, T0 -> T1) -> T1, x2: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x3: T0) { x0(x3) = x1(x3, x0) } = is_well_founded_recursive_solution[T0, T1](x2, x1, x0) }[T, U](f, step, r)
not is_well_founded_recursive_solution[T, U](r, step, f) or forall(x0: T) { f(x0) = step(x0, f) } = true
(forall(x0: T) { not is_well_founded_recursive_solution[T, U](r, step, f) or step(x0, f) = f(x0) })
(forall(x0: T) { step(x0, f) = f(x0) })
not forall(x0: T) { f(x0) = step(x0, f) } or is_well_founded_recursive_solution[T, U](r, step, f)
(forall(x0: T) { f(x0) = step(x0, f) } = true)
function(x0: T) { step(x0, f) = f(x0) }(x)

goal: exists(k0: T -> U) { k0 = f and is_well_founded_recursive_solution[T, U](r, step, k0) }
choose_well_founded_recursive_solution[T, U](r, step, default)(x) = step(x, choose_well_founded_recursive_solution[T, U](r, step, default))

p.c: not exists(k0: T -> U) { is_well_founded_recursive_solution[T, U](r, step, k0) } or not is_predecessor_extensional_recursive_step[T, U](r, step) or not is_well_founded[T](r)
(forall(x0: T -> U) { not is_well_founded_recursive_solution[T, U](r, step, x0) or not is_predecessor_extensional_recursive_step[T, U](r, step) or not is_well_founded[T](r) })
(forall(x0: T -> U) { not is_well_founded_recursive_solution[T, U](r, step, x0) })
function(x0: T -> U) { not is_well_founded_recursive_solution[T, U](r, step, x0) or not is_predecessor_extensional_recursive_step[T, U](r, step) or not is_well_founded[T](r) }(f)
